text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although we originally removed the Kikuka Sho
from her schedule, our adjustments work out, and
Eishin Flash can race in it after all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But she is already looking toward her next goal.
Kikuka Sho or not, she only has one objective in
mind—to get good results.
